data.title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Protection
data.description: Measures to protect against XSS attacks, which are common threats to web applications.
data.technical_spec: Implementing Content Security Policy (CSP) headers and secure coding practices.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks that could disrupt website availability.
data.technical_spec: Deployment of traffic filtering and rate limiting through third-party services.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensuring data security through encryption in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 usage for encryption in transit, and strong cryptographic algorithms for data storage.

data.title: Secure Authentication
data.description: Implementation of robust authentication mechanisms to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication and OAuth 2.0 integration, alongside secure password storage.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent assessments to identify vulnerabilities and bolster security.
data.technical_spec: Conducting penetration testing and code audits regularly to maintain security posture.
